automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: We are building composable workflow frameworks for release orchestration, quality gates, and post-deploy verification to reduce manual friction while improving reliability.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Ebigezo byaffe eby'okuzimba bissa essira ku nteekateeka z'okukyusa obuweereza, enkola z'okugumiikiriza mu bitundu eby'enjawulo, n'enkola y'enkola y'enteekateeka ezikola wansi w'obwetaavu obw'enjawulo.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence

machineLearningPipelines.description: Production AI etandika ne payipu ezigatta obubaka, okugezesa, okukakasa n'okuddamu.

monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability closes the loop between model behavior and operational results.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Versioned data ingestion, quality checks, and reusable feature definitions create a reliable foundation for model training.

modelDevelopment.description: Experiments are tracked with reproducible configurations, objective metrics, and automated comparison baselines.

validationAndSafetyGates.description: Ebiwandiiko by'abalonzi biyita mu nkola, obugumiikiriza, n'okukebera ebyobufuzi nga tebinnaba kukkirizibwa.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Post-deployment telemetry informs retraining priorities, rollback decisions, and next iteration planning.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Real-Time Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Low-latency APIs for interactive applications with autoscaling, caching, and request-level observability.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Batch and Streaming Predictions
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Scheduled and event-driven pipelines for high-volume scoring across analytics and operational workflows.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Deployment
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid cloud-edge serving patterns for environment require local inference and centralized model governance.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/CD for Models
ciCdForModels.description: Automated build, test, and release workflows reduce deployment risk while keeping delivery speed.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry and Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned model artifacts with promotion stages, lineage, and approval workflows improve control and traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Okuweereza Infrastructure
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable serving layers with rollout strategies such as canary and shadow deployments support safe change management.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, and cost efficiency tracking

cta.title: Scale Applied AI with Confidence
cta.description: Bw'oba oteekateeka enteekateeka za AI ezeetaaga ebivaamu ebipimibwa n'okukuuma obukuumi obw'ekiseera ekiwanvu, Horizon esobola okuyamba okuteekateeka n'okutuukiriza obulamu bw'enteekateeka yonna.

hero.title: NLP ey'ennimi ez'enjawulo
hero.description: Explore practical natural language processing capabilities and how they scale into reliable, multilingual production systems.

foundations.title: NLP Foundations
foundations.description: Natural language processing combines linguistic signals and machine learning to extract meaning, intent, and structure from text.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Use the demo to test language detection, sentiment scoring, entity extraction, and translation behaviors in real time.

productionApplications.title: How Horizon Apply NLP in Production
productionApplications.description: Obusobozi bwa NLP bwegattibwa mu mirimu gy'obusuubuzi n'ebipimo by'omutindo obulungi.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Reliability and Governance Principles
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Production NLP needs more than model quality; Kino kisinziira ku nkola y'okukozesa obukuumi n'okukakasa buli kiseera.

foundations.intro1: Enteekateeka za NLP ez'omulembe ziyamba okukozesa ennimi ennansi, okunoonyereza, okuggyamu amagezi, n'okukolagana mu nnimi ennansi. Effective implementation requires both model quality and strong operational controls.
foundations.intro2: At Horizon, we focus on end-to-end NLP systems that combine robust inference with observability, governance, and measurable production impact.

languageDetection.title: Okuzuula olulimi
languageDetection.description: Identify language from short or long text segments to route requests into the right processing pipeline.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Extracts emotional intent and polarity for customer intelligence, support triage, and product feedback loops.

entityExtraction.title: Entity Extraction
entityExtraction.description: Detects structured entities such as names, companies, locations, and dates from unstructured text.

translation.title: Okuvvuunula
translation.description: Okuvvuunula ebiwandiiko ebikozesebwa mu nnimi ennansi ng'okozesa ebiwandiiko ebikozesebwa oba ebikozesebwa ng'okozesa ebiwandiiko ebikozesebwa mu nnimi ennansi.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Support and Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Classify incoming requests by urgency, intent, and sentiment to speed up routing and response quality.

governedContentOperations.title: Controlled Content Operations
governedContentOperations.description: Apply policy-aware language filters and moderation checks with measurable precision and recall targets.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Text-Driven Business Insights
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Aggregate trends from documents, reviews, and communications to inform strategy and operational decisions.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Evaluation by Use Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Models are benchmarked against domain-specific datasets before release decisions are made.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Obukuumi bw'abantu mu Loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: High-impact predictions include review paths, escalation rules, and transparent confidence signals.

continuousMonitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, and quality degradation are tracked continuously so retraining and rollback are proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Explore evolutionary computation in an interactive environment and see how the same principles translate into production optimization systems.

scientificFoundation.title: Scientific Foundation
scientificFoundation.description: Genetic algorithms are population-based optimization methods inspired by natural selection and adaptation.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Interactive Evolution Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Kola ekifaananyi okulaba engeri omubiri gye gukyusa omulembe ku mulembe era olabe engeri okunyigirizibwa kw'okulonda gye kukwatamu ebivaamu.

productionUse.title: How Horizon Uses This in Production
productionUse.description: The same search mechanics used in this demo inform optimization pipelines deployed in operational systems.

applicationDomains.title: Wider Application Domains
applicationDomains.description: Evolutionary optimization is especially valuable in systems with dynamic goals and conflicting constraints.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Mu kifo ky'okunoonya ekirowoozo kimu omulundi gumu, enkyukakyuka ez'obuzaale zikyusa abantu ab'enjawulo. Buli mulembe gupimwa ku nkola y'omubiri era gulongoosebwa okuyita mu kusalawo, okukyusakyusa, n'okukyuka.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Kino kizifuula ez'omugaso ku bizibu eby'enjawulo nga tebirina layini (non-linear constraints), nga enkola z'okunoonyereza ziba nnungi oba ez'ebbeeyi.

selection.title: Okulonda
selection.description: Bannabyabufuzi abakola obulungi babeera n'emikisa mingi okuwonawo n'okukyusa omulembe oguddako.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: Strong traits are recombined to create new candidate solutions with mixed strengths.

mutation.title: Enkyukakyuka
mutation.description: Controlled randomness brings diversity so search does not stall around local optima.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Over many generations, populations trend towards stable, high-quality solutions.

resourceScheduling.title: Enteekateeka y'Ebyobugagga
resourceScheduling.description: We use evolutionary strategies to optimize multi-constraint scheduling where brute-force search is infeasible.

architectureTuning.title: Architecture Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Ebitongole by'ebyokwerinda bipimwa mu ngeri ey'enjawulo okusobola okulongoosa enkola n'enkola y'ebyenfuna.

continuousOptimization.title: Continuous Optimization
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization jobs run in controlled loops with telemetry feedback so systems adapt as demand profiles shift.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Route & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Complex delivery and dispatch planning benefits from evolutionary search when constraints change rapidly.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model and Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Okunoonyereza kw'endagabuzaale kusobola okuzuula enteekateeka ez'okulabirako ez'omutindo ogwa waggulu ng'ebigendererwa by'ebigendererwa biwunya era nga tebirina layini.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Portfolio and Allocation Problems
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization under competitive goals can be framed as fitness tradeoffs across evolving candidate sets.
